globalAttributes.name: k-data
globalAttributes.description:
Creates a reactive data scope. The value is a JS object literal that becomes the local scope for child directives. ```html
```

globalAttributes.name: k-text
globalAttributes.description: Sets the element's textContent from a JS expression. ```html ```

globalAttributes.name: k-html
globalAttributes.description:
Sets the element's innerHTML from a JS expression. **⚠️ Warning:** Only use with sanitized/trusted content. User input may cause XSS. ```html
```

globalAttributes.name: k-show
globalAttributes.description:
Toggles element visibility via display:none. The element remains in the DOM. ```html
Visible when true
```

globalAttributes.name: k-if
globalAttributes.description:
Conditionally renders the element. Removed from DOM when falsy. ```html
Welcome!
```

globalAttributes.name: k-else-if
globalAttributes.description:
Conditional branch after a k-if element. Must be adjacent to the previous branch. ```html

Loading

Error

Done

```

globalAttributes.name: k-else
globalAttributes.description:
Fallback branch after k-if or k-else-if. Must be adjacent to the previous branch. ```html

OK

Not OK

```

globalAttributes.name: k-for
globalAttributes.description: Renders a template for each item in an iterable value. Add :key to reuse row DOM during reorder/update. ```html ```

globalAttributes.name: :key
globalAttributes.description:
Stable key for k-for rows. Used to reuse and move existing DOM.

```html
<template k-for="item in items" :key="item.id">...</template>
```

globalAttributes.name: k-model
globalAttributes.description:
Two-way data binding for form inputs (input, select, textarea, checkbox).

```html
<input k-model="username" />
<select k-model="role">...</select>
<input type="checkbox" k-model="agree" />
```

globalAttributes.name: k-model.trim
globalAttributes.description:
Two-way binding that trims string input before writing to state.

```html
<input k-model.trim="name" />
```

globalAttributes.name: k-model.number
globalAttributes.description:
Two-way binding that parses numeric input before writing to state.

```html
<input k-model.number="age" />
```

globalAttributes.name: k-model.lazy
globalAttributes.description:
Two-way binding that updates on change instead of input.

```html
<input k-model.lazy="keyword" />
```

globalAttributes.name: k-model.debounce.300
globalAttributes.description:
Two-way binding that delays state writes until input settles. The numeric modifier is the delay in milliseconds.

```html
<input k-model.debounce.300="keyword" />
```

globalAttributes.name: k-cloak
globalAttributes.description:
Hides the element until Kupola directives are initialized. Prevents flash of unstyled content. ```html
...
```

globalAttributes.name: k-init
globalAttributes.description:
Runs a statement once when the current scope initializes.

```html
<section k-data="usersPage" k-init="load()"></section>
```

globalAttributes.name: k-ref
globalAttributes.description:
Registers an element reference on the current scope context and walk() result.

```html
<input k-ref="keyword" k-model="keyword" />
```

globalAttributes.name: k-class
globalAttributes.description:
Adds and removes classes from string, array, or object values while preserving static classes.

```html
<button class="btn" k-class="{ 'is-active': active }"></button>
```

globalAttributes.name: k-style
globalAttributes.description:
Adds and removes inline styles from object or string values. ```html
```

globalAttributes.name: k-transition
globalAttributes.description:
Adds CSS class lifecycle hooks for k-show and k-if. Default prefix is kp; k-transition="fade" uses fade-enter-from / fade-leave-to classes. ```html
...
```

globalAttributes.name: k-bind
globalAttributes.description:
Dynamically binds an object of attributes.

```html
<button k-bind="{ disabled: loading, title: label }"></button>
```

globalAttributes.name: k-bind:class
globalAttributes.description:
Dynamically replaces the class attribute. Prefer k-class for conditional class maps. ```html
```

globalAttributes.name: k-bind:style
globalAttributes.description:
Dynamically replaces the style attribute. Prefer k-style for conditional style maps. ```html
```

globalAttributes.name: k-bind:disabled
globalAttributes.description:
Dynamically binds the disabled attribute.

```html
<button k-bind:disabled="isLoading">Submit</button>
```

globalAttributes.name: k-bind:value
globalAttributes.description:
Dynamically binds the value attribute.

```html
<input k-bind:value="currentValue" />
```

globalAttributes.name: k-on:click
globalAttributes.description:
Click event handler.

```html
<button k-on:click="count++">Click me</button>
```

globalAttributes.name: k-on:submit
globalAttributes.description:
Form submit event handler.

```html
<form k-on:submit="handleSubmit(event)">...</form>
```

globalAttributes.name: @submit.prevent
globalAttributes.description:
Form submit handler that prevents the browser's default page reload.

```html
<form @submit.prevent="save()">...</form>
```

globalAttributes.name: k-on:keydown
globalAttributes.description:
Keydown event handler.

```html
<input k-on:keydown="if(event.key==='Enter') submit()" />
```

globalAttributes.name: @keydown.enter
globalAttributes.description:
Keydown handler that only runs for Enter.

```html
<input @keydown.enter="submit()" />
```

globalAttributes.name: @keydown.escape
globalAttributes.description:
Keydown handler that only runs for Escape.

```html
<input @keydown.escape="close()" />
```

globalAttributes.name: @click.outside
globalAttributes.description:
Runs when a click happens outside the element. ```html
```

globalAttributes.name: @input.debounce.300
globalAttributes.description:
Debounced input handler. The numeric modifier is the delay in milliseconds.

```html
<input @input.debounce.300="search()" />
```

globalAttributes.name: k-on:change
globalAttributes.description:
Change event handler.

```html
<select k-on:change="update()">...</select>
```

globalAttributes.name: k-on:input
globalAttributes.description:
Input event handler.

```html
<input k-on:input="search(query)" />
```

globalAttributes.name: k-on:focus
globalAttributes.description:
Focus event handler.

```html
<input k-on:focus="showHelper = true" />
```

globalAttributes.name: k-on:blur
globalAttributes.description:
Blur event handler.

```html
<input k-on:blur="validate()" />
```

globalAttributes.name: k-on:mouseenter
globalAttributes.description:
Mouseenter event handler. ```html
...
```

globalAttributes.name: k-on:mouseleave
globalAttributes.description:
Mouseleave event handler. ```html
...
```
